creator: bsd@inbox.com
text:
Adobe just Released it's acroread 8 for *nix(Solaris,Linux,HP-UX)

FreeBSD can run it in linux compat mode.

download
http://ardownload.adobe.com/pub/adobe/reader/unix/8.x/8.1.1/enu/AdobeReader_enu-8.1.1-1.i486.tar.gz

extract it,execute INSTALL

and run with the script:

#!/compat/linux/bin/sh
UNAME_s=Linux; export UNAME_s
exec $THE_INSTALL_PATH/Adobe/Reader8/bin/acroread "$@"
